title: StudioDash
tagline: Everything your studio needs. One workspace.

hero.alt: StudioDash developer dashboard showing revenue, app status, website analytics, provider health, and operational metrics

shortDescription: A native Mac and iPad analytics workspace for independent app and game developers.
description: StudioDash is a native Mac and iPad analytics workspace from [BarkinMad Studios](/about), designed for independent app and game developers. Bring together revenue, App Store performance, website analytics, provider health, sync status, and long-term trends in one place, so you can spend less time switching between dashboards and more time building great products.

faq.question: What is StudioDash?
faq.answer: StudioDash is a native Mac and iPad analytics workspace that brings together app performance, revenue, website analytics, provider health, and business insights in one place for independent developers.

faq.question: Is StudioDash available on the App Store?
faq.answer: Not yet. StudioDash is preparing for a controlled private beta, with a limited number of independent developers and small studios helping shape the product before public release.

faq.question: Which services does StudioDash support?
faq.answer: StudioDash currently includes support for App Store Connect, Cloudflare, AdMob, AdSense, Google Search Console, Google Ads, GitHub, and other developer services. Additional integrations will continue to be added throughout development.

seoTitle: StudioDash | Developer Analytics Workspace | BarkinMad Studios
summary: StudioDash is a native Mac and iPad analytics workspace that combines app performance, revenue, website analytics, provider health, and operational insights for independent developers.
